channel.title: Forum Mathematicum
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Forum Mathematicum

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Xiaoqi Huang, Xueying Yu, Zehua Zhao, Jiqiang Zheng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2025-frontmatter3
